title: Dinos & Fossils
desc: A responsive educational website exploring dinosaurs and paleontology, built with HTML and CSS to demonstrate strong fundamentals in layout, styling, and user-focused design.

title: CinePickr
desc: CinePickr is a frontend project that allows users to search movies in real-time, manage a personal watchlist, and explore content using filtering and sorting features powered by public APIs.

title: Omni Chat
desc: A web-based AI assistant that leverages Hugging Face models for conversational responses and image generation from natural language prompts.

title: Risk Analytics Terminal
desc: A web application for analyzing investment portfolio risk using metrics such as Value at Risk (VaR), Sharpe Ratio, beta, and asset correlation.
